---
title: "My Resume"
description: "Read my curicculum vitae online"
format:
  html:
    comments: false
    anchor-sections: false
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      content-mode: standard
      sidebar-width: 0px
      margin-width: 0px
---

<p class="text-center p-lg-4 p-0">
In case you want to download my CV, you can get it by clicking this button: 
<a href="https://github.com/stesiam/cvDSen/blob/main/index.pdf" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded btn-sm" target="_blank" aria-label="Button to download my resume in pdf format - the same as the page you read"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download my Curriculum Vitae (CV)</a>
</p>
<hr>

<h2 class="p-0 g-0 border-0 m-0">STESIAM</h2>
<p class="fs-5 fst-italic">Statistics Graduate</p>

::: {.header-contact .d-flex .flex-wrap .justify-content-center .gap-4 .mb-4}
<p class="d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row gap-2 gap-lg-4">
<span><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> stesiam [at] proton [dot] me</span>
<span><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> <a href="https://stesiam.com/">stesiam.com</a></span>
<span><i class="bi bi-github"></i> <a href="https://github.com/stesiam">@stesiam</a></span>
<span><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i> <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/stesiam.bsky.social">@stesiam</a></span>
<span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Athens, Greece</span>
</p>
:::


My name is Stelios and I live in Athens. I am a recent graduate of [Statistics and Insurance Department](https://www.unipi.gr/en/department-of-statistics-and-insurance-science/) at the University of Piraeus. I have a string familiarity with technology and various statistical packages and programs, as well as with R, a programming language that specializes in data analysis. At the moment I would like further improve and make use of my knowledge in Statistics and related software in a working environment. Although I do not yet have working exprerience,  I am eager to work, learn, and develop my skills. I invite you to take a look at my personal projects to better understand my background and level of expertise.


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}

### <i class="bi bi-briefcase"></i> PROJECTS {.section-title}

#### Scraping data 
<p class="small"><a href="https://github.com/stesiam/insuranceRegister" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded btn-sm" target="_blank" aria-label=""><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub Repo</a></p>

On this project I scrape the register of Insurance companies which is hosted on Bank of Greece's website. The dynamic nature of the table led to use a combination of rvest and RSelenium. On every page iteration I get the table data and on every row iteration I automate a click on every insurance companies' profile in order to scrape their address wherever it is provided.

#### Data Visualization
<p class="small"><a href="https://stesiam.com/gallery/" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded btn-sm" target="_blank" aria-label=""><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub Repo</a></p>

For at least two years I have been practicing on data visualization using R and ggplot. Those years I have taken part to a lot of challenges such as [#TidyTuesday](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday), and [#30DayChartChallenge](https://github.com/30DayChartChallenge).

#### Data Analysis
<p class="small"><a href="https://stesiam.com/posts/kaggle-greek-community/" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded btn-sm" target="_blank" aria-label=""><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> Article URL</a></p>

An analysis based on Kaggle's recent survey (2022). My analysis focuses primarily on Greek users. Comparing them with the rest users of Kaggle, I came up with interesting facts as the comparatively low representation, significantly higher age and expeirience and lower representation of women in contrast to the average participation of women in Kaggle.

#### ML Web Applications
<p class="small"><a href="https://stesiam.shinyapps.io/Dev-Wages-App/" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded btn-sm" target="_blank" aria-label=""><i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> Web App URL</a></p>

Based on Greek Developers' Wages survey, I make the appropriate cleaning of data in order to build a regression (XGBoost) model with tidymodels. The app can predict the wage of a web developer based on some characteristics such as years of programming experience, employer's country,  etc. The accuracy of my model can be characterized mediocre due to the fact that the dataset is relatively small, as it is consisted of 800 participants. Light enhancements, concerning model's accuracy, have been observed in case of larger grids and combining models.


### <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> EDUCATION {.section-title}
- **BSc. in Statistics and Insurance Science**<br>
<i class="bi bi-building"></i> [University of Piraeus](#)<br>
<i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i> *Graduated at June, 2025*

<p>During my studies, I was taught several statistics-related courses and had some
exposure to statistical programs. Indicatively, <br>
- Probabilities<br>
- Statistics: Estimation Theory<br>
- Non-parametric Statistics<br>
- Sampling and <br>
- Statistical Programs using R <br>
are some of the most influential courses that helped me develop my knowledge
regarding Statistics.</p>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .sidebar-column}

### <i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> PROGRAMMING {.section-title}
- R (Rstats)
- SQL (dbplyr)
- JavaScript (DOM)
- Python

### <i class="bi bi-tags"></i> SKILLS {.section-title}
- Linux (Ubuntu)
- Git
- LaTeX
- HTML/CSS
- Docker
- Web apps (Shiny)
- API (plumber / FastAPI)
- Data analysis
- Machine learning

### <i class="bi bi-translate"></i>LANGUAGES {.section-title}
- Greek (native)
- English (C2)

:::

:::
